Unit: bag, Batch x1: 1, Batch x2: 2, Batch x3: 3, Batch x4: 4, Prep/Brand: Nippon Tempura Flour

Mix all ingredients well, ensuring all flour is smooth and no clumps.
Set fryer to ~320°F
With a ladle, pour the tempura mixture into the fryer at a steady, slow stream to ensure crumb/flakes are created
Fry until crispy, slightly golden.  Use a fine mesh strainer to gather and remove from fryer.
Before reserving to a perforated hotel pan over a full hotel pan, ensure all excess oil is dripped from the crumble
Allow to cool in a safe manner, sure not to over-pile and allow a fire to smolder in the hot flakes.
Reserve to appropriate containers lined with sport towels.
Store in a cool, dry place.
